content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Strong broad-based rally — Nifty +1.13%, Bank Nifty +1.16%, Auto +2.12% leading on Maruti/Bajaj-Auto Q4 prints, PSU Bank +1.59%, VIX -3.85% to 17.75. All eight existing holdings are positive ex-GOLDBEES/ONGC. Tape supports trailing SLs aggressively rather than chasing fresh entries at extended levels.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24060,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1032.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 FY26 print strong (PAT +19% YoY, GNPA 0.93%, AUM +13%). Stock at 1047, SL at 1032 already at breakeven+ (entry 984). Original target 1110 still ~5.5% away. SL 1032 is 1.5% below CMP — good gap, do not tighten further given low ATR and breakout structure."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defensive macro hedge holding. -1.7% within tolerance, SL 119 = -4.9% from entry. Bullish gold thesis intact (JPM target $5,055/oz, central bank buying). Hold to SL or target."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1793.30,
      "new_target": 1860.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 1819, SL 1793 already locks +3.4% gain (entry 1734). Q4 results May 19 — binary event ~10 trading days away, still outside the 3-session binary-event window. Target 1860 within reach. SL 1793 = 1.5% below CMP, appropriate gap. No-op MODIFY would be wasteful so leaving as-is via HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Correcting prior MODIFY — values unchanged from stored, would be no-op. Hold current SL 1793.30 / target 1860. Will reassess as Q4 May 19 approaches (3-session pre-event rule will trigger ~May 14)."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 476.00,
      "new_target": 495.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 483, SL 472 → tighten to 476 (locks +1.5% from entry 469). 476 is 1.5% below CMP — meets trail-gap discipline. Q4 print mixed (+11% PAT YoY but FY -12%, April production -9.7%). Target 495 within 2.5%. Tightening because rally extended near 52w-high 485.70."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 201.00,
      "new_target": 215.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 204.43, SL 200 (breakeven). Volume 8.2x with Q4 PAT +68% YoY — institutional accumulation. Trail SL to 201 (1.7% below CMP, locks +0.5%). Raise target to 215 — already at 52w-high 204.44, breakout argues for extension. Original target 210 nearly hit."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ONGC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Crude $101-111, upstream beneficiary, Q4 May 21. CMP 298 vs entry 302 (-1.5%), SL 296 = -2% from entry. Thesis intact. Hold to SL or rebound toward 305+."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Pharma defensive +1.7%, SL 23.55 (~0.4% below entry, ~1.8% below CMP 24.05). Sector outperforming Nifty YTD on tariff-relief tailwind. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 928.00,
      "new_target": 985.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 946, SL 915 → tighten to 928 (1.9% below CMP, locks -1.7% max risk vs entry 944, smaller drawdown if reversal). Q4 PAT +23%, AUM crossed Rs 5L cr, GNPA 1.01% best-in-class. Bullish backdrop intact. Target 985 unchanged."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1032.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already at solid breakeven+ level. Don't tighten further until 1080+."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "Macro hedge, original SL/target intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1793.30,
      "reasoning": "SL already locks +3.4% gain. Will pre-emptively trim ahead of May 19 Q4 results in 3-session window."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 476.00,
      "reasoning": "Lock +1.5% gain at 52w-high; April production miss is a downside risk."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 201.00,
      "reasoning": "Volume confirms breakout; trail tight given chase risk at 52w-high."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ONGC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 296.00,
      "reasoning": "Crude tailwind, Q4 May 21. SL 2% below entry is appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 23.55,
      "reasoning": "Defensive ETF position, no change."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 928.00,
      "reasoning": "Tighten SL to reduce risk budget; Q4 strong print, momentum building."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BHEL/AMBUJACEM/BAJAJ-AUTO/MARUTI all have binary results events TODAY or this week — defer entry until post-print and post-gap-fill. SYNGENE Q4 already out (-19% PAT) but stock +9% on short squeeze — chase risk, skip. TORNTPOWER cooldown elapsed and JERA/Nabha catalysts material, but Q4 May 26 binary risk + extended +25% in a month keep it on watch only. INFY guidance 1.5-3.5% disappointed Street, sector lagging — bearish bias, no entry. ADANIPORTS/MANAPPURAM/EXIDEIND/TATACHEM/FLUOROCHEM/KOTAKBANK — all noted but no entry without pullback or fresh setup.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployed 42% with 8 names — diversified across HFC, gold, pharma, energy/metal, banking, NBFC. Six of eight positions in profit. No new entries today: tape is extended (Nifty +1.13% with Auto +2.12% leadership, gap-up across many watchlist names), and the right action is risk management on existing winners rather than chasing breakouts at peak prices on Day 15. Pending GESHIP BUY @ 1542 from 4+ days ago — should review/cancel in next tick if still working (CMP not provided here). Will re-evaluate cash deployment once Q4 cluster (Cipla May 13, Sun May 19, ONGC May 21, TORNTPOWER May 26) clears and post-results setups emerge with cleaner R:R."
}
